items.name: ARES GEN-3 Exoskeleton [Torso] [Red]
items.description:
The third-generation Augmented Reflex Enhancement System (ARES) is a state-of-the-art exoskeleton frame developed by the BLKT Corporation, widely regarded as one of their flagship military assets. Standard-issue across BLKT's military forces, the exoskeleton has also surfaced repeatedly beyond official channels, rumored to have been funneled into black markets amid the ongoing corporate war.

items.description:
A Hellion Taskmaster is a most wretched thing indeed. Given command of a retinue of up to 15 other Hellions, Taskmasters are the backbone of the fell mage’s army, the veterans of ambushes, raids, and combat action. It is a prestigious and perilous position in Hellion society; because the only way to become a Taskmaster is by defeating one and taking their place…

Only available in the FirstSight Homestore.
